title: Starburst V2
description: Version 2 of the pink and purple texturepack Starburst 16x, delightfully modified for a sweeter experience.
body:
# **Starburst V2**
Pink _(primary)_ & Purple _(secondary)_ texturepack for 1.8 PvP gamemodes such as Skywars, Bedwars, & UHC!
This pack changes; PvP Items (Weapons, Health items, Armor), Tools (Axe, Hoe, Pickaxe, Shovel, Etc), Skybox, GUI & more!

The original is a galactic themed pack by VanillaSpooks, VibingLOL, & JezzyP. And this version is enhanced, nova!

Thumbnail created by [@TheMiracle_](https://www.youtube.com/@TheMiracle_/featured)
